app.title: Floating point from scratch: Hard Mode
app.author: random__duck
app.description: A floating-point unit simulator, implemented from scratch in assembly language
use_modes: Run a benchmark program and measure execution time.
Verify the output of a floating-point calculation matches expectations.
proposed_tests: Measure the performance of the floating-point unit for various input data.
Verify the accuracy of the floating-point calculations for a range of inputs.
